name: cree
description: Cree, now known as Wolfspeed, is the global leader in Silicon Carbide (SiC) and Gallium Nitride (GaN) power semiconductors. The company pioneered SiC technology and continues to drive innovation in wide bandgap semiconductors for electric vehicles, renewable energy, and industrial applications.
longDescription: Founded in 1987 and now operating as Wolfspeed, Cree has been at the forefront of wide bandgap semiconductor technology for over three decades. The company invented the world's first commercial SiC MOSFET and continues to lead the industry in SiC and GaN power device innovation. Wolfspeed's products enable breakthrough performance in electric vehicle powertrains, fast charging infrastructure, renewable energy systems, and industrial power supplies. With the industry's largest SiC fabrication facility and comprehensive vertically integrated manufacturing, Wolfspeed delivers unmatched capacity, quality, and reliability. The company's technology enables systems with higher efficiency, higher switching frequency, and higher power density than traditional silicon solutions.

seoTitle: Cree Wolfspeed | SiC MOSFETs, GaN HEMTs, Power Modules | BeiLuo
seoDescription: Authorized distributor of Cree Wolfspeed SiC MOSFETs, GaN HEMTs, and power modules. Technical support for EV, renewable energy, and industrial applications.

faqs.question: What is the relationship between Cree and Wolfspeed?
faqs.answer: Cree and Wolfspeed relationship: (1) Cree founded in 1987 as LED and semiconductor company. (2) Wolfspeed was Cree's power and RF division. (3) In 2021, Cree sold LED business and rebranded as Wolfspeed. (4) Wolfspeed now focuses exclusively on SiC and GaN power devices. (5) Same technology, same team, new name. (6) Wolfspeed is the global leader in wide bandgap semiconductors. (7) Products still reference Cree legacy part numbers. When searching for Cree power products, look for Wolfspeed branding.
faqs.decisionGuide: Wolfspeed is the new name for Cree's power semiconductor business; products are fully compatible.

faqs.question: What are the advantages of Wolfspeed SiC MOSFETs?
faqs.answer: Wolfspeed SiC MOSFET advantages: (1) Efficiency - 70-90% lower switching losses than silicon IGBTs. (2) Frequency - Switch at 100kHz+ vs 20kHz for IGBT. (3) Temperature - Higher junction temperature capability (200°C). (4) Size - Smaller magnetics and cooling systems. (5) Reliability - Proven in billions of device-hours. (6) Performance - Lowest Rds(on) in industry. (7) Support - Comprehensive design resources and FAE support. Wolfspeed invented commercial SiC MOSFET technology and continues to lead innovation.
faqs.decisionGuide: Choose Wolfspeed SiC for highest efficiency and power density applications.

faqs.question: What applications are best suited for Wolfspeed GaN devices?
faqs.answer: Wolfspeed GaN HEMT applications: (1) High-frequency SMPS - 500kHz to several MHz operation. (2) Telecom power - Datacenter and 5G infrastructure. (3) Audio amplifiers - Class D with high fidelity. (4) LiDAR - High-speed switching for automotive. (5) RF power - Radar and communications. (6) Consumer adapters - Compact, efficient chargers. (7) Motor drives - High-speed servo systems. GaN excels where highest switching frequency and smallest size are required.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use GaN for high-frequency applications >500kHz; SiC for high-power >10kW.

faqs.question: Does Wolfspeed offer automotive-qualified devices?
faqs.answer: Yes, Wolfspeed offers AEC-Q101 qualified devices: (1) Automotive SiC MOSFETs - Full range qualified to AEC-Q101. (2) PPAP support - Full production part approval process. (3) IATF 16949 - Automotive quality management certified. (4) EV applications - Powertrain, OBC, DC-DC converters. (5) Reliability - Enhanced screening for automotive. (6) Traceability - Full lot traceability for safety. (7) Support - Dedicated automotive FAE team. Wolfspeed is the leading supplier of SiC devices for electric vehicles.
faqs.decisionGuide: Wolfspeed automotive SiC MOSFETs are ideal for EV powertrain and charging applications.

faqs.question: What design resources does Wolfspeed provide?
faqs.answer: Wolfspeed design resources: (1) Reference designs - Complete EV charger, inverter designs. (2) Spice models - Accurate simulation models. (3) Evaluation kits - Hardware for device evaluation. (4) Application notes - Comprehensive design guides. (5) Online tools - Loss calculator, thermal simulator. (6) FAE support - Global field application engineering. (7) Training - Webinars and technical workshops. Wolfspeed provides the most comprehensive SiC design support in the industry.
faqs.decisionGuide: Access Wolfspeed's extensive online resources; contact BeiLuo FAE for personalized support.

faqs.question: How does Wolfspeed ensure supply security?
faqs.answer: Wolfspeed supply security measures: (1) Mohawk Valley Fab - World's largest SiC fabrication facility. (2) Vertical integration - From crystal growth to finished devices. (3) Capacity expansion - Continuous investment in capacity. (4) Multi-source - Multiple manufacturing locations. (5) Inventory programs - Strategic buffer stock. (6) Long-term agreements - Available for key customers. (7) Quality - Industry-leading yield and reliability. Wolfspeed is committed to supporting customer growth with secure supply.
faqs.decisionGuide: Wolfspeed's vertical integration and capacity expansion ensure reliable supply for high-volume programs.
